trivia_bullets.text: Core Set 2020 (M20) released July 12, 2019 — the second core set in the post-Kaladesh era of core set restoration. M20 was themed around Chandra Nalaar's origin story and featured multicolor Elder Dragons as the mythic cycle. Marauder's Axe is a generic Equipment filler common with no plane-specific narrative attachment. [Scryfall: set m20, released_at 2019-07-12]

Marauder's Axe was first printed in Core Set 2019 (M19, July 2018), then reprinted in Core Set 2020 (M20, July 2019) and Jumpstart (JMP, July 2020) — three consecutive summer releases in the same broad print window, marking it as a core-set staple Equipment filler. Artist: Mitchell Malloy. [Scryfall: prints search — m19 2018-07-13, m20 2019-07-12, jmp 2020-07-17]

Flavor text (verbatim): "A sharp axe solves most problems." [Scryfall: flavor_text field]. No speaker attributed — the line reads as generic marauder folk-wisdom, consistent with M20's flavor-text style on common Equipment cards.

Marauder's Axe gives +2/+0 for a total investment of {4} ({2} cast + {2} equip) — a cost-inefficient Equipment by contemporary standards. EDHREC rank 21,921 reflects near-zero Commander inclusion. Legal in Pauper and Pauper Commander (colorless Equipment with no color restriction), where its floor is occasionally functional. [Scryfall: edhrec_rank 21921, legalities]
